invalid.notes: Lineage-sensitive product transition. After balance migration, customers could no longer deposit, withdraw, or trade on Coinbase Pro, and transaction history remained accessible only until the end of 2023.

HEI models LocalCryptos as a dead P2P / DEX-like marketplace because new trade creation was disabled after 2022-11-18. The website and wallet interface may remain available, so official_url_status is partial rather than offline.

HEI uses scam_rug as the death_reason because contemporary reporting described CoinGather as abruptly disappearing after withdrawal problems and later reporting / DOJ material tied the exchange to seized assets. This should be read as suspected / reported exit-scam context, not as a final criminal adjudication in this record.

HEI treats BitMarket.eu separately from BitMarket.pl. The death_reason is insolvency because contemporary records describe customer funds being lost through operator speculation and old balances being frozen. The 2013-03-19 date is used as the terminal operations-closed marker from investor communications.

HEI treats Stocks.exchange and STEX as the same historical exchange record because multiple tracker references describe STEX as previously Stocks.exchange. The record is inactive rather than dead because the evidence set supports no active market data / no longer operational status, but does not establish a clean official terminal shutdown date.

HEI uses voluntary_shutdown because current tracker references preserve SouthXchange's own wind-down message: operational activities are concluding, deposits and trading are deactivated, and users were instructed to withdraw funds before 2024-01-31. The site may remain reachable for notice / withdrawal context, so official_url_status is partial rather than offline.

HEI uses regulation as the primary death_reason because the terminal service suspension was announced as cooperation with a Guangxi police investigation. The record also notes the preceding liquidity crisis and withdrawal restrictions in June-July 2022.

HEI uses status acquired and death_reason acquisition because Kraken completed the BCM acquisition and BCM users were directed toward Kraken. successor_id remains null because Kraken is not currently linked as a successor entity in this record.

HEI uses status rebranded and death_reason rebrand because Cryptowisser lists Bitbox in the Exchange Graveyard with reason Rebranding, and public exchange profiles describe BITFRONT as previously known as BITBOX. successor_id points to the existing BITFRONT record.

HEI uses status rebranded and death_reason rebrand because Alfacash states that ALFAcashier rebranded to alfa.cash in 2020, and Cryptowisser Exchange Graveyard lists AlfaCashier with a 2020-11-25 Rebranding marker. successor_id remains null because Alfacash is not yet a canonical HEI entity.

HEI uses status rebranded and death_reason rebrand because BingX official materials announced the new brand identity in November 2021 and Cryptowisser states that Bingbon rebranded into BingX. successor_id points to the existing BingX record.

HEI uses status rebranded and death_reason rebrand because Multichain's official announcement says Anyswap shall be known as Multichain from 2021-12-16. successor_id remains null because Multichain is not yet a canonical HEI entity. country_or_origin follows the Singapore dateline in official Multichain PR materials and should be treated as source-context based.

CoinFLEX is added as a predecessor / superseded identity linked to existing OPNX record. Confidence is medium because public reporting supports the continuity, but the transition is not a simple clean exchange-name rebrand.
